title: Iran's armed forces do not view war as over — 'still in war situation'
snippet: Islamic Republic Army Spokesman Mohammad Akraminia stated Iran's armed forces do not view the war with the United States as fully over — military conditions are still in place. IRGC and traditional army remain fully prepared to launch many more missiles and drones at regional countries and US forces if US/Israel try to take Iran 'back to the Stone Age' through more strikes. Statement contradicts Trump's 'State of Collapse' claim.
tag_reason: 이란군 대변인의 '��쟁 상황 지속' 성명은 신규. 트럼프 붕괴 주장에 대한 직접 반박.
